member.name: M:ChatWootApi.Application.IApplicationContactsApi.ContactMergeAsync(System.Int64,System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Merge two contacts into a single contact. The base contact remains and receives all data from the mergee contact. After the merge, the mergee contact is permanently deleted.
This action is irreversible. All conversations, labels, and custom attributes from the mergee contact will be moved to the base contact.
member.param: The numeric ID of the account.
Request payload.
Token used to cancel the asynchronous operation.

member.summary: Toggle the status of a conversation. Pass `status` to explicitly set the conversation state. Use `snoozed` along with `snoozed_until` to snooze a conversation until a specific time. If `snoozed_until` is omitted, the conversation is snoozed until the next reply from the contact. Regardless of the value provided, snoozed conversations always reopen on the next reply from the contact.
member.param: The numeric ID of the account.
The numeric ID of the conversation.
Request payload.
Token used to cancel the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:ChatWootApi.Application.IApplicationReportsApi.GetChannelSummaryReportAsync(System.Int64,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get conversation counts grouped by channel type and status for a given date range. Returns statistics for each channel type including open, resolved, pending, snoozed, and total conversation counts.
**Note:** This API endpoint is available only in Chatwoot version 4.10.0 and above. The date range is limited to a maximum of 6 months.
member.param: The numeric ID of the account.
Query parameters.
Token used to cancel the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:ChatWootApi.Application.IApplicationReportsApi.GetInboxSummaryReportAsync(System.Int64,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get conversation statistics grouped by inbox for a given date range. Returns metrics for each inbox including conversation counts, resolution counts, average first response time, average resolution time, and average reply time.
member.param: The numeric ID of the account.
Query parameters.
Token used to cancel the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:ChatWootApi.Application.IApplicationReportsApi.GetAgentSummaryReportAsync(System.Int64,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get conversation statistics grouped by agent for a given date range. Returns metrics for each agent including conversation counts, resolution counts, average first response time, average resolution time, and average reply time.
member.param: The numeric ID of the account.
Query parameters.
Token used to cancel the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:ChatWootApi.Application.IApplicationReportsApi.GetTeamSummaryReportAsync(System.Int64,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get conversation statistics grouped by team for a given date range. Returns metrics for each team including conversation counts, resolution counts, average first response time, average resolution time, and average reply time.
member.param: The numeric ID of the account.
Query parameters.
Token used to cancel the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:ChatWootApi.Application.IApplicationReportsApi.GetFirstResponseTimeDistributionAsync(System.Int64,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get the distribution of first response times grouped by channel type. Returns conversation counts in different time buckets (0-1h, 1-4h, 4-8h, 8-24h, 24h+) for each channel type.
**Note:** This API endpoint is available only in Chatwoot version 4.11.0 and above.
member.param: The numeric ID of the account.
Query parameters.
Token used to cancel the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:ChatWootApi.Application.IApplicationReportsApi.GetInboxLabelMatrixAsync(System.Int64,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get a matrix showing the count of conversations for each inbox-label combination. Returns a list of inboxes, labels, and a 2D matrix where each cell contains the count of conversations in a specific inbox that have a specific label applied.
**Note:** This API endpoint is available only in Chatwoot version 4.11.0 and above.
member.param: The numeric ID of the account.
Query parameters.
Token used to cancel the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:ChatWootApi.Application.IApplicationReportsApi.GetOutgoingMessagesCountAsync(System.Int64,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get the count of outgoing messages grouped by a specified entity (agent, team, inbox, or label). When grouped by agent, messages sent by bots (AgentBot, Captain::Assistant) are excluded.
**Note:** This API endpoint is available only in Chatwoot version 4.11.0 and above.
member.param: The numeric ID of the account.
Query parameters.
Token used to cancel the asynchronous operation.

member.summary: The url to which the events will be send

member.name: P:ChatWootApi.Application.Webhook.Secret
member.summary: Secret used to sign webhook requests. Signed webhook deliveries include `X-Chatwoot-Timestamp` and `X-Chatwoot-Signature`; the signature is `sha256=` followed by the HMAC-SHA256 of `{timestamp}.{raw_request_body}` using this secret. Deliveries also include `X-Chatwoot-Delivery` when a delivery id is available.

member.name: M:ChatWootApi.Application.ChatwootWebhookSignatureHelper.VerifySignature(System.String,System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.String,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Verifies that a Chatwoot webhook signature matches the raw request body.
member.param: Signature from the X-Chatwoot-Signature request header.
Unix timestamp in seconds from the X-Chatwoot-Timestamp request header.
Raw JSON request body bytes.
Chatwoot webhook secret.
Current time used to validate the replay window.
Allowed timestamp skew; defaults to five minutes when omitted.
member.returns: True when the signature, timestamp, and raw request body are valid.
